title: First screen, Close button
scenario: Onboarding first screen Close button returns user to Home screen instead of dismissing onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the Home screen, tap the menu icon or navigate to the onboarding flow (e.g., via 'Add Device' or first-time setup).
3. On the first onboarding screen, locate and tap the Close button (X) in the upper right corner.
expected: The user is returned to the original start screen (Supported Devices or Home screen).
